subject: Internet very slow since yesterday
description: My internet speed has been extremely slow since yesterday evening. I'm only getting 5 Mbps instead of the 100 Mbps I'm paying for. I've already tried restarting the modem but it didn't help. I work from home and this is affecting my job.

subject: Wrong billing amount charged
description: I was charged PHP 2,450 on my February bill but my plan is only PHP 1,299 per month. There are charges for data add-ons I never purchased. Please reverse these unauthorized charges immediately or I will file a complaint with NTC.

subject: No signal for 3 days in our area
description: Walang signal sa area namin sa Tagum City for 3 days na. Hindi makatawag, hindi maka-text, walang data. Napakaraming tao ang affected. Kailan nyo po ito aayusin? Napakawalang-kwenta ng service nyo!

subject: Request for plan upgrade with retention offer
description: I've been a xFusionCorp customer for 8 years. I want to upgrade my business fiber plan but I saw that PLDT is offering a better deal. Can you match their PHP 1,999 plan with 200 Mbps? Otherwise I'll switch to PLDT next month when my contract ends.

subject: SIM swap request - phone stolen
description: My phone was stolen this morning at SM Dasmarinas. I need an emergency SIM swap immediately to protect my xCash account linked to this number. The stolen phone number is 0917-XXX-XXXX. Please block the old SIM right away.

subject: Frequent disconnection during video calls
description: For the past two weeks, my fiber connection drops every 30-45 minutes, especially during video calls. This is a major problem as I have online classes and work meetings. The modem lights go red then come back after 2-3 minutes. I've reported this twice already but nobody has fixed it.

subject: Enterprise WiFi deployment schedule for new office
description: We are opening a new branch office in Eastwood City next month. We need xFusionCorp Enterprise Managed WiFi for 150 employees with dedicated bandwidth of 500 Mbps. Can you schedule a site survey this week? Our IT team is available Mon-Wed. Contact our IT Manager James at ext 4521.

subject: xCash payment not reflected in load balance
description: I loaded PHP 500 through xCash 4 hours ago. The payment was deducted from my xCash but the load is not showing on my xFusionCorp prepaid. Transaction ref: GC20250303-98765. Please credit my account immediately. This has happened three times already this month!
